title: Generated Help, Structured Results, Output Channels, and Accessibility · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Output Channels
summary: Help and dispatch drift apart, handlers print directly, object iteration changes display order, errors use color alone, and progress rewrites one terminal line that assistive technology cannot follow. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts output channels increment in accessible deterministic terminal view layer. Learners progre…
objectives: Separate structured data, human status, diagnostics, and exit behavior through injected writers and stable formatting.
Return a discriminated command result for data, usage, recoverable error, quit, and aborted outcomes before presentation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
